violations.text: The faucet arm at the 3-bay sink was observed non-movable (fused or stuck), affecting the ability to fill all 3 bays. PIC stated work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the pantry, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt and gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods yogurt in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and table in hallway. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
Single service items observed stored on the floor beneath the hallway table. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

The ceiling light covers in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
